packApplicability.reason: JUnit 4 usage was detected. This pack targets JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 readiness.

evidence.name: OpenRewrite dry-run readiness
evidence.note: OpenRewrite execution is available through transform --engine openrewrite when Maven or Gradle execution is available.

nextActions.title: Review JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 migration risks
nextActions.reason: JUnit 5 readiness depends on explicit review of JUnit 4 APIs, runners, dependencies, and Vintage engine assumptions.
